g.text: 802 Bankview Dr, Drumheller, Alberta | File VAL251026
The comparable sales indicate an overall unadjusted unit value range from $108,333/Unit to $170,833/Unit, and an
average of $149,514/Unit. After adjustments, the comparables indicate a narrower range for the subject property
from $121,958/Unit to $143,741/Unit, and $134,255/Unit on average. The adjustment process is summarized below.
